hero.title:
Advanced Medical
Equipment for
Modern Healthcare
hero.subtitle: Supplying certified diagnostic, surgical, and patient-monitoring systems to hospitals and clinics worldwide.

about.title: Equipment That Powers Better Outcomes
about.p1: Mediforma was founded with a single mission: give healthcare providers access to world-class diagnostic and therapeutic technology at competitive prices. We partner directly with leading manufacturers to eliminate unnecessary markups and ensure every device arrives fully certified and warranty-backed.
about.p2: From a rural clinic's first ultrasound unit to a metropolitan hospital's full radiology suite, we tailor solutions to every scale of practice.

card1.title: Diagnostic Imaging
card1.desc: MRI, CT, ultrasound, and X-ray systems from certified OEM partners — ready for immediate deployment.

card2.title: Surgical Systems
card2.desc: Operating tables, laparoscopic towers, electrosurgical units, and sterilization equipment.

card3.title: Patient Monitoring
card3.desc: Bedside monitors, central station systems, telemetry units, and ICU-grade vital-signs platforms.

card4.title: Laboratory Equipment
card4.desc: Analyzers, centrifuges, microscopes, and point-of-care testing systems for clinical labs of every size.

card5.title: Rehabilitation
card5.desc: Physiotherapy devices, TENS units, ultrasound therapy, and mobility-support equipment.

card6.title: Emergency & ICU
card6.desc: Ventilators, defibrillators, infusion pumps, and crash-cart equipment for critical-care environments.

quote.text: Mediforma delivered our radiology suite on time and on budget. The post-install support was exceptional.
quote.author: — Dr. Amara Osei, Chief Radiologist, Accra General Hospital

card1.title: OEM-Direct Pricing
card1.desc: We negotiate volume contracts directly with manufacturers, passing savings straight to you.

card2.title: Regulatory Compliance
card2.desc: All devices carry CE, FDA, or local-market certifications. Our compliance team handles customs documentation.

card3.title: White-Glove Installation
card3.desc: Certified biomedical engineers handle site preparation, installation, and staff training on-site.

card4.title: Extended Warranty
card4.desc: Up to 5-year service contracts with guaranteed response times and genuine spare parts.

card5.title: Flexible Financing
card5.desc: Operating lease, CAPEX purchase, and government tender frameworks — we structure the deal that fits your budget.

card6.title: Global Logistics
card6.desc: Cold-chain aware freight, white-glove last-mile delivery, and 48-hour emergency parts shipping worldwide.
